questions.question: What is the purpose of `@vue/compat` (the compatibility build) in a Vue 3 migration?
options: It rewrites Vue 2 components automatically to Vue 3 syntax
It runs Vue 2 code on the Vue 3 runtime and logs deprecation warnings
It provides a dual-mode build for serving both Vue 2 and Vue 3 users
It converts Options API to Composition API at build time

questions.question: Which Vue 2 API was completely removed in Vue 3 (pipe syntax like `{{ price | currency }}`)?
In Vue 3, what replaced `$listeners` that was removed from Vue 2?
options: Event listeners are now passed as regular props
